title: Anwenk Heavy Duty Nutcracker Pecan Walnut Plier Opener Tool with Wood Handle
features: Heavy duty spring loaded nutcracker - Easy cracking nuts, pecan,hazelnuts, almonds, walnut, brazil nuts, etc. Note:May not work for hard black walnut. Tax Included.
More convenient to use compare with traditional crackers - Save using this cracker without injuring yourself with traditional cracker and makes cracking nuts a lot of fun!
High Quality Wood Handles- Can hold on tight for perfect cracking, Instead of whole metal handle that chill you hand, this wood handle cracker is your best choice to crack nuts in cold winter!
Material: Enameled die casting aluminum with high quality wood handles which can hold on tight for perfect cracking.
Plier Hole Diameter (Max.): 2"; Total Length:(approx.) 6.89". (This product can also work as a bottle opener.)
description: Product Description Anwenk Nut Cracket Wooden Handle,1 Pack This type of nutcracker is very easy to use. If the nut/pecans/walnut is still not open after the first crack, try to rotate the nut and crack it one/two more time. Note: May not work for hard black walnut. Plz read carefully before order. This product can also work as a bottle opener. See Another Recommended Nut Cracker(Top Grade), Plz search "B0761LQP5R".
